title: Naked Among Wolves
writer: Bruno Apitz, Frank Beyer, Alfred Hirschmeier
actors: Erwin Geschonneck, Armin Mueller-Stahl, Krystyn Wójcik
plot: In the last weeks of World War II, inmates of Buchenwald concentration camp hide a Polish child from the SS guards, hoping that the advance of the American forces will set them free.
language: German, Polish, Czech, French, Russian, English
